---
title: "AEM 7010"
pagetitle: "AEM 7010 · Doing Applied Economics Research"
title-block-style: none
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
/* Hide Quarto's auto title block on the home page */
header.quarto-title-block,
header#title-block-header,
.quarto-title-block { display: none !important; }

/* Hide the docked sidebar on the home page */
#quarto-sidebar,
.sidebar.sidebar-navigation,
nav#quarto-sidebar { display: none !important; }

/* Reclaim the body width that the hidden sidebar was occupying */
main.content,
#quarto-document-content,
.quarto-container > .content {
  margin-left: auto !important;
  margin-right: auto !important;
}

.aem-hero {
  text-align: center;
  padding: 2.75rem 1rem 1.5rem;
}
.aem-hero .hero-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin: 0 0 0.6rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.aem-hero .hero-subtitle {
  font-size: 2.1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #B31B1B;
  margin: 0 0 1rem;
  line-height: 1.1;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}
.aem-hero .hero-instructors {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  max-width: 620px;
  margin: 0 auto 1.25rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.aem-hero .hero-instructors a { color: #B31B1B; }
.aem-hero .hero-meta {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #6B6B6B;
}
.spine-label {
  text-align: center;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  margin: 2.5rem 0 1rem;
}
.course-spine {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  align-items: stretch;
  gap: 0.75rem;
  margin: 0 auto 1.5rem;
}
@media (max-width: 720px) { .course-spine { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); } }
@media (max-width: 460px) { .course-spine { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.spine-block {
  border: 1px solid #e2e2dc;
  border-radius: 6px;
  background: #FAFAF7;
  overflow: hidden;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.spine-block .block-header {
  padding: 0.7rem 0.9rem 0.6rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e2dc;
  background: #fff;
}
.spine-block .block-name {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #1B1B1B;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.spine-block .block-dates {
  display: block;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  color: #6B6B6B;
  font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
  margin-top: 0.2rem;
}
.spine-block .block-body {
  padding: 0.55rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  flex: 1;
}
.spine-session {
  display: block;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.65rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #fff;
  border-left: 3px solid #B31B1B;
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.3;
  transition: background 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
}
.spine-session:hover {
  background: #F7F4E9;
  transform: translateX(2px);
  text-decoration: none;
  color: inherit;
}
.spine-session .num {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: #B31B1B;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  display: block;
}
.spine-session .title {
  display: block;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-top: 0.1rem;
}
.color-trends { border-top: 4px solid #6B6B6B; }
.color-trends .num { color: #6B6B6B; }
.color-trends .spine-session { border-left-color: #6B6B6B; }
.color-repro { border-top: 4px solid #1F4E8C; }
.color-repro .spine-session { border-left-color: #1F4E8C; }
.color-repro .num { color: #1F4E8C; }
.color-git { border-top: 4px solid #0F6E56; }
.color-git .spine-session { border-left-color: #0F6E56; }
.color-git .num { color: #0F6E56; }
.color-ai { border-top: 4px solid #B31B1B; }
.color-ai .spine-session { border-left-color: #B31B1B; }
.color-ai .num { color: #B31B1B; }

/* On the home page, keep the Cornell seal in the navbar but hide the course
   title text since the hero already carries it. */
.navbar .navbar-title { display: none !important; }
</style>

<div class="aem-hero">
  <h1 class="hero-title">AEM 7010</h1>
  <p class="hero-subtitle">Doing Applied Economics Research: Practical Skills</p>
  <p class="hero-instructors">Co-instructors: <a href="https://barrett.dyson.cornell.edu/">Chris Barrett</a>, <a href="https://heatherschofield.net/">Heather Schofield</a>, <a href="https://arielortizbobea.github.io">Ariel Ortiz-Bobea</a>. This site documents the eight sessions led by Ariel. Sessions 2 and 3 are guest-led by <a href="https://www.ilr.cornell.edu/people/lars-vilhuber">Lars Vilhuber</a>, AEA Data Editor.</p>
  <div class="hero-meta">Spring 2026 · Mon/Wed 8:40 to 9:55 am · Warren 137</div>
</div>

<div class="spine-label">The course in four blocks</div>

<div class="course-spine">

  <div class="spine-block color-trends">
    <div class="block-header">
      <span class="block-name">Trends</span>
      <span class="block-dates">Apr 8</span>
    </div>
    <div class="block-body">
      <a class="spine-session" href="intro/session1.html">
        <span class="num">Session 1</span>
        <span class="title">Trends in Economic Research</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="spine-block color-repro">
    <div class="block-header">
      <span class="block-name">Reproducibility</span>
      <span class="block-dates">Apr 13 &ndash; 15</span>
    </div>
    <div class="block-body">
      <a class="spine-session" href="reproducibility/session2.html">
        <span class="num">Session 2</span>
        <span class="title">Reproducibility I</span>
      </a>
      <a class="spine-session" href="reproducibility/session3.html">
        <span class="num">Session 3</span>
        <span class="title">Reproducibility II</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="spine-block color-git">
    <div class="block-header">
      <span class="block-name">Version control</span>
      <span class="block-dates">Apr 20 &ndash; 22</span>
    </div>
    <div class="block-body">
      <a class="spine-session" href="version-control/session4.html">
        <span class="num">Session 4</span>
        <span class="title">Git Fundamentals</span>
      </a>
      <a class="spine-session" href="version-control/session5.html">
        <span class="num">Session 5</span>
        <span class="title">GitHub and Collaboration</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="spine-block color-ai">
    <div class="block-header">
      <span class="block-name">AI tools</span>
      <span class="block-dates">Apr 27 &ndash; May 4</span>
    </div>
    <div class="block-body">
      <a class="spine-session" href="ai-tools/session6.html">
        <span class="num">Session 6</span>
        <span class="title">AI Tools I: Chat</span>
      </a>
      <a class="spine-session" href="ai-tools/session7.html">
        <span class="num">Session 7</span>
        <span class="title">AI Tools II: Cowork</span>
      </a>
      <a class="spine-session" href="ai-tools/session8.html">
        <span class="num">Session 8</span>
        <span class="title">AI Tools III: Claude Code</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```
